creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
security/cargo-audit version 0.18.3 always fails in Cirrus CI, though version 0.17.6 does not.  The likely problem seems to be that GCP (which Cirrus uses) has some kind of TLS proxy that does not work with the newer cargo-audit version.  Since CI pipelines are a major use for this package, and since Cirrus is the most popular CI provider for Rust projects, I suggest that the port be rolled back to 0.17.6, if possible.

Upstream issue: https://github.com/rustsec/rustsec/issues/1058

Workaround: instead of using this port, build from source with "cargo install --version=0.17.6 cargo-audit"
